title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Bikanervala Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bikanervala Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Surat team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!
